title: cyclosorus loyalii
intro: Cyclosorus loyalii, also known as Loyal's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. Its health benefits include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating respiratory problems and skin conditions. Cyclosorus loyalii can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or powder, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
